title: abutilon bedfordianum subsp. discolor
intro: Abutilon bedfordianum subsp. discolor, also known as the orange flowered flowering maple or orange hollyhock, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing skin irritations due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Abutilon bedfordianum subsp. discolor can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
